name: horti-gestao
description: Sistema PDV para hortifruti e pequeno comércio
author: Horti Gestão

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n NEXT,ELECTRON -c green,blue "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && node electron/copy-static.cjs && electron-builder build --win --x64
scripts.electron:pack: npm run build && node electron/copy-static.cjs && electron-builder build --win --x64 --dir
